news.title: Roldan: 'Huge gap' in U.S. midfield without Adams
news.summary: United States midfielder Cristian Roldan said that upcoming friendlies against Belgium and Portugal are a "great opportunity" for the contingent of USMNT midfielders to show what they're capable of.

news.title: 'I think she's made an obvious error' - Pundits disagree with Chelsea disallowed goal
news.summary: Nikita Parris and Ellen White agree that the referee was hasty in disallowing a goal for Chelsea in the Women's Champions League quarter-final for a supposed push by Veerle Buurman on Arsenal's Laia...
